creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

We can't put all X applications under "x11", or half the ports tree 
will end up there and that category will be virtually useless. ;) 

That said, it is not inconceivable to virtually "split" the X world 
into "x11-wms" "x11-widgets" "x11-clocks", etc.  Let me investigate.
